# Packaging Factory Direct

> B2B custom packaging manufacturer based in Shenzhen, China.
> Factory direct pricing. MOQ 500 PCS. OEM and ODM only. No public retail price.
> RFQ handled by Linda Wang.

## Who we are

Packaging Factory Direct is a Shenzhen-based custom packaging factory. We produce
paper boxes, magnetic gift boxes, mailer boxes, stand-up pouches, coffee bags with
valve, pharmaceutical boxes, cosmetic boxes, food packaging, paper bags and printed
labels for brand owners and B2B buyers worldwide.

## What we do

- Structural design (dieline, box style, closure type, insert tray)
- Print & finishing: CMYK, Pantone matching, gold/silver foil, embossing, debossing,
  spot UV, matte / gloss / soft-touch lamination, specialty paper finishes
- Serialization and pharma traceability: GS1 DataMatrix, batch/lot printing
- OEM / ODM: full brand customization, sampling, mass production, export packing
- Worldwide shipping (sea / air / express)

## MOQ policy

- Standard MOQ: 500 PCS per SKU
- Some SKUs may allow smaller trial runs on RFQ
- Rush sampling available (paid)

## Who we serve

- Boutique retail brands (jewelry, cosmetics, skincare, candles, apparel)
- Food & beverage brands (restaurants, coffee, tea, snacks, pet food)
- Pharma / medical / medical aesthetic packaging buyers
- E-commerce / DTC / mailer packaging buyers
- Corporate gifting and PR programs

## How to request a quote

Provide: product type, box dimensions, quantity, artwork (AI/PDF/PSD), Pantone
color, foil color, material, and shipping country.

- Contact: Linda Wang
- Email: linda@colorprintingpackage.com
- WhatsApp: +86 181 6573 0353
- Site: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com
